description: قراءة دليل التسجيل + فحص نوافذ Chrome المفتوحة
command_preview: Write-Host '=== Chrome Windows ==='; Get-Process chrome -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.MainWindowTitle -ne ''} | Select-Object Id, MainWindowTitle | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Host '=== Guide File Check ==='; if (Test-Path 'C:\temp\gbp\registration_guide.html') { Write-Host 'Guide exists'; $content = Get-Content 'C:\temp\gbp\registration_guide.html' -Raw -Encoding UTF8; Write-Host ($content.Substring(0, [Math]::Min(3000, $content.Length))) } else { Write-Host 'Guide NOT found at C:\temp\gbp\' ; Get-ChildItem 'C:\temp\' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name }
